macie.session.FindingPublishingFrequency.Description: The frequency with which Amazon Macie publishes updates to policy findings for an account. This includes publishing updates to AWS Security Hub and Amazon EventBridge (formerly called Amazon CloudWatch Events). Valid values are:  + FIFTEEN_MINUTES+ ONE_HOUR+ SIX_HOURS

macie.session.Status.Description: The `MacieStatus` of the `Session`. Valid values include `ENABLED` and `PAUSED`.
